summary: Killer show with excellent performance but only fair audience‑type recording
review: The concert is praised as a “killer” performance, earning the reviewer a full five stars for the music. The audio, however, receives a modest 3.5‑star rating and is noted to be inferior to another audience (AUD) source the reviewer possesses.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is rated 5/5 (70% weight) and recording quality 3.5/5 (30% weight), yielding a weighted average of ~4.6. Only one review limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer gives the recording 3.5 stars and mentions having a better AUD source, implying this version is of moderate clarity and not optimal.
